name: io.github.Servosity/nerdio-mcp
title: Nerdio Manager MCP
description: The first non-PowerShell client for the Nerdio Manager for MSP API - cross-account AVD fleet

environmentVariables.name: NERDIO_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Set the NERDIO_BASE_URL credential for the Nerdio Manager MCP server.

environmentVariables.name: NERDIO_TOKEN_URL
environmentVariables.description: Set the NERDIO_TOKEN_URL credential for the Nerdio Manager MCP server.

environmentVariables.name: NERDIO_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Set the NERDIO_CLIENT_ID credential for the Nerdio Manager MCP server.

environmentVariables.name: NERDIO_CLIENT_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: Set the NERDIO_CLIENT_SECRET credential for the Nerdio Manager MCP server.

environmentVariables.name: NERDIO_OAUTH_SCOPE
environmentVariables.description: Set the NERDIO_OAUTH_SCOPE credential for the Nerdio Manager MCP server.
